elements.description: Two equal risers (both labeled 'EQ.') covering the 0.50m level change from ดินถม (±0.00) up to the small landing outside ซักล้าง

elements.grid_ref: outside ซักล้าง, box '3 +0.50 3'
elements.description: A small landing labeled 'เฉลียง' (used here generically for 'veranda/landing' at this service entrance, distinct from the larger front-porch เฉลียง room near grid1-2/gridB-A documented on the ground floor plan and ST.1 detail)

'ลูกตั้ง,ลูกนอน บันไดผิวปูกระเบื้องเซรามิค 8"x8"' (riser+tread, 8x8in ceramic tile) and 'จมูกบันได อลูมิเนียมสีเงิน ร่อง PVC. ขนาด 2"' (nosing, silver aluminum, 2in PVC groove) -- matches the plan view's material note and ST.1's equivalent note exactly

warnings: Second of 2 views on this page; sibling is the plan view _view1_st2_plan.json.

This section confirms ST.2 is a small 2-riser service-entrance stair from grade level up into ซักล้าง, resolving the ground floor plan's previously-flagged 'ST2 callout has no clearly matching drawn stair icon' ambiguity (see _หน้า06_floor_plan_ground.json warnings and this sheet's view1 file).

The riser height is labeled 'EQ.' (equal division) on this sheet rather than a specific printed numeric value -- if the total rise is 0.50m split into 2 equal risers, that implies 0.25m each, but this is inferred rather than directly printed, so left as null in the structured field.
